quietRisk: High — finish-area noise until 18:00+, road closures affect hotel access
avoidWarning: Road closures may require detours to reach hotel. Confirm with hotel which entrance is accessible on race day.

station: Zoologischer Garten (U2, U9, S5, S7, S75)
quietRisk: Low — away from finish chaos, established hotel district
avoidWarning: None. Excellent spectator base. Ku'damm course section is walkable.

station: Eberswalder Str. (U2) / Schönhauser Allee (U2, S8, S85)
quietRisk: Low — residential neighborhood, away from course
avoidWarning: U2 is your lifeline — if U2 is disrupted, transit options narrow significantly.

quietRisk: Low — nightlife area but Saturday night may be noisy
avoidWarning: Saturday night noise from bars/clubs. Choose a hotel on a quiet side street, not directly on Oranienstraße.

station: Berlin Hauptbahnhof (S5, S7, S75, U5, ICE/IC)
quietRisk: Med — train station area has some noise, but finish is walkable
avoidWarning: Hotels here tend to be expensive. Good backup reunion point if staying here.

quietRisk: Low — quiet residential, good transit hub
avoidWarning: Course passes through neighborhood — some local road closures. But U-Bahn access is excellent.
